# UC-15.5.11 · CCTV NVR Host CPU and Memory Resource Saturation

## Description

Recorder saturation drops frames and delays exports during incidents.

## Value

Justifies scale-out or GPU offload before renewal.

## Implementation

(1) Agent or API poll. (2) Correlate with analytics enablement.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-24h
| eval cpu=tonumber(coalesce(cpu_util_pct, host_cpu_pct, ""))
| eval mem=tonumber(coalesce(mem_util_pct, ram_used_pct, ""))
| where cpu>85 OR mem>90
| timechart span=5m avg(cpu) avg(mem) by nvr_name
```

## Visualization

Dual axis CPU/mem.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
